title: wasm/client: challenge nonce extracted as raw string without PoW token support
description: In wasm/src/client.rs connect(), the WASM auth handshake at step 3 parses only v['params']['nonce'] from the challenge notification. If the relay requires PoW (difficulty > 0 in params), the WASM client sends an authenticate request with no pow_token field. The relay will then reject authentication with POW_REQUIRED or similar. The native transport (core/src/transport.rs) correctly handles the difficulty field and mines a token. The WASM client has no PoW mining path at all. Trigger: any relay with POW_DIFFICULTY > 0 causes WASM clients to fail authentication silently (they get a JSON-RPC error back but the error is surfaced as a general auth failure).
